standaloneReleaseGate.reason: Cambium's standalone product gate is the portable six-scale fractal tapestry contract, synthetic demo tenant path, adapter boundaries, memory boundaries, archive ceremony, asset governance, and passing release audit. Final R3F game-engine visual parity is valuable product work, but it is not required for the non-visual standalone release gate.
requiredEvidence: README.md documents the standalone fractal tapestry and synthetic demo path
bin/tapestry-snapshot.test.mjs verifies the six-scale standalone map
docs/assets/provenance.json covers R3F runtime and QA visual assets
docs/archive/release-scope.json closes the archive release gate

r3fGameEngineRealignment.reason: The R3F milestone tracks final visual/game-engine acceptance: scene architecture, tactical overview, zoom states, HUD/control bay, scene-native visualizations, design-system sheet, Electron readiness, and screenshot acceptance. These improve the product experience but should not redefine whether the standalone fractal tapestry is portable and free of private company state.
mustRemainTrueForRelease: R3F app tests and build pass in the final audit
R3F fixtures remain synthetic or provider-neutral
release-facing docs do not claim final visual parity until the milestone closes

releaseDecision: remove R3F final visual parity from the non-visual standalone release blockers while keeping issues 44-52 open as the visual-product acceptance roadmap
